notes: FROZEN — kiro-cli 2.5.1 has no first-party cloud/remote background-agent dispatch surface (no `kiro-cli cloud` command; the only 'cloud'/'govcloud' strings are AWS region/endpoint config; delegate/use_subagent/spawn are LOCAL async subagents writing .kiro/.subagents/ with local PIDs, not a remote-infra handoff). agent_supports: no → route frozen, mirroring aider/opencode/pi. No state phases are asserted: there is no observable session for the daemon to record. The observation vector is documented for completeness — kiro-cli's JSONL carries no model/token/cost (FINDINGS.md §4), so model is unknown and cost/tokens are zero; were this cell ever recordable, those would need the <uuid>.json metering sidecar a future MetricsReader could read.
